programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2235 Jethalal suspects Tappu is hiding something from him. Tappu is secretly planning a trip to Goa with his friends.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2236 Sonu and Madhavi convince Bhide to let them go on the trip to Goa. Tapu Sena are happy that they can go on a trip together, but Gogi is still waiting for his answer.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2237 Bhide arranges a meeting before the trip to Goa. However, he gets into an argument with Jethalal, and an annoyed Champaklal refuses to go with them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2238 Tapu Sena promise to plan the trip themselves, but Bhide believes they will spend excessively. Madhavi tries to get Bhide to relax.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2239 Jethalal assigns Bhide to take care of Champaklal in Goa. At the airport, everyone questions the intensive security check before they find out that a thief is trying to smuggle an artefact.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2240 In Goa, the thief follows the Gokuldham society residents to their resort as he is determined to find the smuggled artefact.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2241 Tony's boss pressures him to find the smuggled artefact. The Gokuldham society residents are enjoying their vacation, unaware that Tony is following them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2242 After failing to retrieve the artefact, Tony's boss reprimands him. While those who are in Goa enjoy sports day, Jethalal, Taarak, and the other residents call Bhide from Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2243 Roshan, Sodhi, and Bhide meet a foreign tourist on the beach and introduce her to Popatlal. Madhavi and Roshan confront Sodhi and Bhide after learning of a secret.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2244 Sodhi and Bhide prank their wives by telling them they are going to have iced tea. Tapu Sena plan a surprise for the adults.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2245 The thieves try to get away from Chalu Pandey, but Roshan Sodhi catches them. The police manage to arrest the mastermind behind the operation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2246 The Gokuldham society residents return home and realise that Champaklal is missing. Jethalal blames Bhide for being irresponsible.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E374 Bharat Bhai seeks help from Jethalal to hide some cash in his house. Jethalal is scared about the black money but agrees to help his friend.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E375 One of Jethalal's friends hands him 5,000,000 rupees in cash in a steel box. Jethalal asks Daya to keep the box safe in her cupboard.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E376 Taarak takes a day off from work to write an article on corruption. Jethalal calls Taarak and tells him about the money he has at home.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2605 Taarak Mehta learns that Jethalal is growing tired of running his business because of the pressure. Jethalal shouts at Nattu Kakka and Bagha about the store.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2606 When all the men from the society are having soda, Jethalal tells them about his work problems. Champaklal learns of this and motivates him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2607 Goli catches Taarak throwing away the bitter gourd juice given to him by Anjali. After seeing the newspaper ad, Jethalal's neighbours decide to talk to him about the shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2608 A strange kid refuses to give his mother's mobile number until Bawri agrees to his request. Taarak tries to help Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2609 Jethalal assures Champaklal that he will not sell his shop and learns that Nattu Kaka and Baga are responsible for putting the ad in the newspaper.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2610 Jethalal remembers that when he was in a desperate situation, he had asked Nattu Kaka and Bagha to sell the shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2611 Nattu Kaka and Bagha tell Jethalal why they decided to sell the shop. Magan reveals that the new owner wants them to vacate the shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2612 Two well-built men try to hoist banners outside Jethalal's shop and ask him to sign the licensing agreement of the shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2613 Two men inform Jethalal that Surma Bhai wishes to acquire his property. When Champaklal pleads with them to let him meet Surma Bhai, they arrange for a meeting at midnight.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2614 Bhide informs Jethalal's neighbours that Jethalal is in trouble. Jethalal calls Mehta and asks him to accompany him for his meeting with Surma Bhai.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2615 Jethalal shares his worries with regards to the shop with his neighbours. Popatlal informs him that he has found someone whom Surma Bhai will listen to.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2616 Kajal Behen demands INR 50 lakhs from Jethalal in exchange for her help. Surma Bhai's thugs call and threaten Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2617 Jethalal's friends decide to meet Surma Bhai and to convince him to let go of the shop. They accompany Jethalal to meet Surma Bhai at Madh Island.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2618 At Madh Island, Jethalal and his neighbours lose their way and spot a woman wearing a white saree and holding a diya. At Surma Bhai's bungalow, a man recounts his harrowing tale.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2619 Surma Bhai shows Jethalal a video in which Nattu Kaka tells that Jethalal has agreed to sell the shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2620 Surma Bhai tells Jethalal that he wishes to gift the shop to Munna and threatens to kidnap Nattu Kaka if Jethalal refuses to vacate the shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2621 Dr Hathi advises Jethalal to consult a lawyer with regards to the shop. Jethalal and his neighbours go to meet the lawyer the following day.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2622 Surma Bhai's thugs order Jethalal to vacate the shop within 52 hours. Dawawala advises Jethalal to file a criminal case against Nattu Kaka.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2623 The lawyer advises Jethalal to fire Nattu Kaka in order to make his case stronger. When Jethalal refuses, Dr Hathi asks everyone to consult with anybody they can to help resolve the issue.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2624 Jethalal and everyone tries to think of a solution to save Gada Electronics from Surma Bhai, but they find that their resistance is futile.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2625 Jethalal is heartbroken as he has no choice but to sell off Gada Electronics. He decides to seclude himself from everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: S1 E2626 On their way to the police station, Jethalal's friends find him sitting inside the temple. Champaklal consoles Jethalal and mentions that businesses can be rebuilt.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
